questions.question: How do I create a report?
questions.answer: Click on 'Add New Report' or 'Report an Issue' and fill out the form.

questions.question: How can I edit my report?
questions.answer: Go to 'My Reports' from the dashboard to edit your reports.

questions.question: How do I view all civic issues?
questions.answer: To see all civic issues and reports, visit our live map.

questions.question: How do I login or signup?
questions.answer: You can log in or create a new free account from the login page.

questions.question: How do points work?
questions.answer: NIRVAAH uses a points system! You earn points for reporting issues (+10) and getting upvotes (+2). Admins handle the resolutions. Check out the Leaderboard to see top citizens!

questions.question: How to contact support?
questions.answer: You can reach out to our administration at support@nirvaah.com for any further questions.

questions.question: What is this website about?
questions.answer: NIRVAAH is a community-driven platform to report local civic issues and earn points for keeping the community clean.
